utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the format requirements: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical (LifeFirst Standard Plan €100/month), mental (LifeFirst Standard Plan €65/month), and a combined cost €165/month. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists PrimeHome Premium Coverage €90/month and cost €90/month. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists PrimeTravel Premium Plan €115/month and cost €115/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists telemedicine €10/month, premium membership €20/month, and a combined cost €30/month. Fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly before discount, discount applied, final monthly cost, and annual cost. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for home/contents, PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel insurance, Telemedicine Services as an add-on, and Premium Insurance Membership as an add-on. I matched each of these to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their exact rating numbers.
